s1.title: Privacy by default
s1.text: Alfred Wallet reduces network traceability using Tor with isolated connections and session-based circuit rotation.

s2.title: On-chain privacy
s2.text: Built on Taproot and the Lightning Network, the wallet improves efficiency and reduces blockchain exposure.

s3.title: Network anonymization
s3.text: Each interaction uses isolated network paths to reduce correlation between user activity and sessions.

s4.title: Flexible custody
s4.text: Choose between full self-custody, Lightning privacy mode, or federated custody with Fedimint.

restore.title: Restore Wallet
restore.subtitle: On-chain secured Bitcoin wallet (Taproot)
restore.security: Your seed never leaves this device
